resources.string: MangoSSH is maintaining user-initiated SSH sessions and port forwards.
Active sessions and port forwards appear here.
The bundled native Mosh client is unavailable. Reinstall a complete MangoSSH build.
The bundled Mosh terminal database is unavailable. Reinstall a complete MangoSSH build.
This action is available only for SSH sessions. Mosh uses its own UDP terminal transport.
Starting Mosh over an authenticated SSH bootstrap…
Mosh bootstrap failed. Ensure mosh-server is installed and UDP is reachable on the remote host.
Biometric unlock is currently unavailable on this device. Use your PIN instead.
Verify your identity to unlock MangoSSH
